name: {🌕} ALAN – LA LUNA FALSA / The Fake Moon
description:
Secret somewhat established relationship? This definitely will go smoothly!

{{ Moon / Luna pov }}

' Since the beginning, we have always worshipped the moon.

We offer it our loyalty, and in return it offers us protection, health, and salvation.

The moon warned us that there would be imposters that we should be aware of.

And those who fall into their traps, are doomed into the abyss. '

The tale of the fake moon had spread through generations, guiding and leading wolf kin away from danger.

... So what was Alan doing laid against the “danger” like good friends?

PFP does not belong to me, as well as the character. This is inspired off the AU comic

“La Luna Falsa” / “The Fake Moon”

made by JulliApple.
creator: Crazy_Loser.
